name: Sauteed Potatoes & Chicken Santa Fe
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet.
2. Brown the chicken for about 5 minutes until cooked through.
3. Cook the potatoes in the microwave on high for approximately 10 minutes until tender.
4. Add the potatoes to the skillet with the chicken and sauté until lightly browned.
5. Stir in the corn and salsa, mixing well and heating through.
Serves 4 (I usually make about 2/3 of this recipe for myself and my SO, and we never have leftovers).
